ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held by the user */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Total cost basis of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss on the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
